findings.title: Public database endpoint
findings.description: The database endpoint is publicly reachable.
findings.impact: Sensitive data can be exposed to internet-based attacks.
findings.remediation: Disable public access and restrict connectivity to private networks.

findings.title: No deployment approval gate
findings.description: Production deployments do not require manual approval.
findings.impact: Risky changes can reach production without human review.
findings.remediation: Require protected environments and approval gates.
